Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 105 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science 44 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Lent and Lisp 62 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 110 upvotes, 12 comments
  5. Attention Residuals 183 upvotes, 25 comments
  6. Mamba-3 145 upvotes, 21 comments
  7. Ghostling 237 upvotes, 41 comments
  8. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 65 upvotes, 9 comments
  9. Atuin v18.13 – better search, a PTY proxy, and AI for your shell 26 upvotes, 2 comments
  10. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 711 upvotes, 228 comments
  11. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 762 upvotes, 266 comments
  12. VisiCalc Reconstructed 211 upvotes, 79 comments
  13. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 873 upvotes, 400 comments
  14. Molly Guard 122 upvotes, 48 comments
  15. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 64 upvotes, 23 comments
  16. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 368 upvotes, 180 comments
  17. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 199 upvotes, 97 comments
  18. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 146 upvotes, 72 comments
  19. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 68 upvotes, 29 comments
  20. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 90 upvotes, 46 comments
  21. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 227 upvotes, 141 comments
  22. The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation 77 upvotes, 44 comments
  23. Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel 36 upvotes, 17 comments
  24. We give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 577 upvotes, 469 comments
  26. Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004) 52 upvotes, 31 comments
  27. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 291 upvotes, 235 comments
  28. The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020) 6 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. Why One Key Shouldn't Rule Them All: Threshold Signatures for the Rest of Us 11 upvotes, 7 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 544 upvotes, 980 comments

Last generated 8:00pm, 21 March 2026. Source here.
